effects.effect: You can target 1 Vivosaur you control; apply Counter to that Vivosaur.

effects.name: Counter PLUS+
effects.effect: After this Vivosaur is played: apply Counter to all [Invertebrate] Vivosaurs you control. While you control this Vivosaur, Counter applied to [Invertebrate] Vivosaurs have 3 turn counters, instead of 2.

effects.name: Stampede
effects.effect: Flip a coin, if heads: use this Skill again without exerting FP. Continue this effect until you land tails.

effects.name: Life Charge
effects.effect: Target a Vivosaur you control; it heals 200 LP.
